overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy riding a white horse through a rocky canyon that opens up to a riverside trail. The overcast day creates diffused lighting as the rider encounters another horseman and continues along the water's edge through forested terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain canyon with steep walls

agents.ego_description: trotting steadily through narrow rocky canyon on horseback, navigating uneven terrain

entered.detail: steep rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rock face on the right side of the narrow path
large rocks scattered across the canyon floor and slopes
sparse shrubs and small trees growing on the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character rides a white horse through a narrow rocky canyon with steep stone walls on both sides. The path is uneven and covered with gravel and scattered boulders, with sparse vegetation clinging to the rock faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside transition area with open sky

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open riverside area with river becoming visible on the left
encounters another rider on horseback coming from the opposite direction and passes them

agents.ego_description: riding along the widening riverside path, passing another horseman traveling in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse approaching from the opposite direction and passing by the ego character

entered.detail: wide river with calm water flowing alongside the path
grass-covered slope rising from the trail

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up to reveal a river on the left as the character emerges into a more open area. While riding along the riverside path, another horseman approaches from the opposite direction and passes by. The terrain becomes greener with grassy banks replacing the rocky walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested riverside trail with birch trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank at a steady pace, surrounded by forest

entered.detail: cluster of white-barked birch trees along the path
gentle grassy hillside rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues riding along the peaceful riverbank, passing through a grove of birch trees with white bark. The river flows calmly on the left while a grassy slope rises on the right, creating a serene forested corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the confines of a narrow rocky canyon into a serene, forested riverside landscape. It begins with a white horse navigating an uneven gravel path flanked by steep stone walls and sparse vegetation. As the rider emerges from the canyon, the terrain opens up to reveal a river on the left and lush grassy banks, where another horseman is encountered and passed. The scene then shifts into a peaceful corridor as the path follows the calm water's edge, passing through a grove of white-barked birch trees. Finally, the movement continues along the riverbank between the flowing water and a rising grassy slope under a soft, overcast sky.
